markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on contract renewal and a new integrated SEO/AEO content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Contract Renewal:** Prophecy will non-renew by the Nov 2 deadline to pursue a short-term extension (3–6 months) to prove ROI before committing to a full year.](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [**New Strategy:** An integrated SEO/AEO strategy will build domain authority to improve AI visibility. Initial focus is on "Data Prep" and "AI Data Analysis."](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [**Execution Blockers:** Publishing is blocked by the lack of a `/guides` page and an auto-updating XML sitemap. Both are required to enable the planned 5 articles/week cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=1628.0)

## Topics

### Contract Renewal

  - [**Context:** The current contract requires 30 days' non-renewal notice by Nov 2.](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [**Prophecy's Position:** Non-renew to pursue a short-term extension (3 months) to prove ROI before committing to a full year.](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Position:** A 6-month extension is preferred due to high demand and the need to ensure a strong long-term fit.](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [**Path Forward:** Wilton will discuss the 6-month proposal with Raj; Kyle will discuss the 3-month proposal with Marcel.](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)

### Website Migration & SEO Health

  - [**Status:** The new website is live.](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
  - [**Performance Issue:** The site's Google PageSpeed score is 45/100, a critical issue that must be addressed by the web manager.](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will perform a technical SEO audit this week to identify and fix any post-launch issues.](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)

### New Content Strategy: SEO & AEO Integration

  - [**Core Principle:** An integrated SEO/AEO strategy is required, as strong SEO (e.g., domain authority) directly improves AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [**Research Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
      - [Analyzed Reddit for user questions and pain points.](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
      - [Analyzed competitor SEO keywords to find high-volume, low-difficulty opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)
      - [Paring down broad competitor topics to focus on high-impact areas.](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
  - [**Topic Prioritization (Airtable):**](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
      - **\#1 Priority: Data Prep & Transformation**
          - [**Rationale:** High search volume, low keyword difficulty, and strong question intent.](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
          - [**Scope:** Includes data cleaning, which is relevant for data analysts even if some occurs in the engineering pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
          - [**Content Format:** "Ultimate Guide" approach to build authority and stand out from competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)
      - **\#2 Priority: AI Data Analysis**
          - [**Rationale:** Identified as a key topic in Reddit research.](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
      - [**Experimentation:** Competitor comparisons (e.g., Alteryx) will be explored for their proven AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=1505.0)
  - [**Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=1586.0)
      - [**Short-Term:** Referral traffic from AI sources (awareness play).](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
      - [**Long-Term:** Pipeline conversion from high-intent traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)

### Execution Plan & Blockers

  - [**Cadence:** 5 articles/week, targeting a 2-week start date.](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=1628.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)
    1.  [**Calibration:** GrowthX delivers 2–3 articles next week for feedback to align on quality standards.](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)
    2.  [**Ramp-up:** After calibration, increase production to 5 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)
  - [**Blockers:**](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=1628.0)
      - [**`/guides` Page:** A new section is needed to host content, separate from the blog.](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=1628.0)
      - [**XML Sitemap:** Must auto-update to include new `/guides` content, ensuring it is indexed by search engines.](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=1882.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Wilton:** Discuss the 6-month extension proposal with Raj.](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)
  - [**Kyle:** Discuss the 3-month extension proposal with Marcel.](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [**Cody:**](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=1825.0)
      - [Request the web manager create the `/guides` page with an auto-updating XML sitemap.](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=1825.0)
      - [Approve the first 5–10 content assignments in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=1849.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
      - [Perform a technical SEO audit of the new site.](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
      - [Deliver 2–3 calibration articles next week.](https://fathom.video/share/xhu1nmAVh6bfeBVpsQLxyV1oc2pxTBbk?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)
